reviews.comment:
Uno de las estaciones con mejor servicio no recibe tarjeta de de crédito pero la atención de personal de playa es muy bueno y si eres socio del automóvil clup servicio de Grua

(Translated by Google)
One of the stations with the best service doesn't accept credit cards, but the service from the forecourt staff is very good, and if you're a member of the Auto Club, they offer towing service.
